Interface AllowsXLinkAttributes

All Known Subinterfaces:
SVGUse
All Known Implementing Classes:
SVGElementAdapter, SVGGenericElement, SVGUseImpl, TypeSymbol, UMLConnector
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: AllowsXLinkAttributes.java 1133 2024-05-10 21:43:08Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public interface AllowsXLinkAttributes
SVG elements that allow the XLink attributes "xlink:actuate", "xlink:arcrole", "xlink:href", "xlink:role", "xlink:show", "xlink:title", and "xlink:type" will implement this interface.
Author:
Thomas Thrien - thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org
Version:
$Id: AllowsXLinkAttributes.java 1133 2024-05-10 21:43:08Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.5
